chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Criminal Misc: Application No. S-70 of 2026 Date Orders with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 16-03-2026 Mr. Quwat Ali Shah, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Sardar Ali Solangi, D.P.G for the State a/w SIP Shafique Abro on behalf of SSP Kashmore @ Kandhkot and ASI Rahib Essani, I/C SHO, PS Guddu. * * * * * * * * * * * * * * Through the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application, the applicant has alleged that her daughter Mst. Tasleem has been illegally abducted by respondents No.5 to 7, who are stated to be her relatives. Today, the alleged abductee Mst. Tasleem is present in person in Court along with respondent No.7, who is her maternal grandmother. The applicant is called absent; however, her learned counsel is present. On query made by the Court, Mst. Tasleem states that she is Sui Juris and that she has come of her own free will. She further states that she intends to reside with her maternal grandmother of her own free will and without any coercion or pressure. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General submits that since Mst. Tasleem is Sui Juris, she may be set at liberty to reside wherever she desires in accordance with law. In view of the categorical statement made by the alleged abductee Mst. Tasleem, who is admittedly Sui Juris, and as she has expressed her desire to live with her maternal grandmother of her own free will, no case for illegal detention is made out. Consequently, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is devoid of merit and is dismissed accordingly. The alleged abductee Mst. Tasleem is set at liberty to reside wherever she wishes in accordance with law.
The alleged abductee Mst. Tasleem is set at liberty to reside wherever she wishes in accordance with law. J U D G E
